prompt: Turn 1 of /ship-to-learn, user wants to learn Rust by building a small CLI tool.

assertions.text: Asks Q0 about whether this is a UI/frontend project before any other intake question
Mentions or performs prereq verification (git, superpowers, context7)
Does NOT ask about known stacks, target stack version, idea, time budget in this turn
Does NOT create .learn/ or progress.json this turn
